nodes.speaker: Huang Rong
nodes.text: Oh? You look unfamiliar, young friend. Are you new to Xiangyang?

nodes.speaker: Huang Rong
nodes.text: I'm Huang Rong, and this is my husband Guo Jing. I've heard you meet friends through Go. How's your skill?

nodes.speaker: Huang Rong
nodes.text: My father Huang Yaoshi is well-versed in the Eight Trigrams. I've learned much from him about Go strategies and mechanisms. Would you like to learn something?

options.text: Miss Huang, I'd like to play another game with you

nodes.speaker: Huang Rong
nodes.text: Hehe, 'Mechanism Mastery' is a Go technique I created. When playing, I calculate multiple variations in my mind, like trying different paths to see which is best.

nodes.speaker: Huang Rong
nodes.text: The beauty of this technique is that you can establish multiple variation branches and repeatedly deduce until you find the optimal move. As Father always says, 'Proper planning brings success,' and it's the same with Go.

options.text: Sounds impressive! Please teach me, Miss Huang

nodes.speaker: Huang Rong
nodes.text: Alright! But I don't teach this technique to just anyone. You must play a game with me first so I can assess your level.

nodes.speaker: Huang Rong
nodes.text: When Father taught me Go, he said, 'Go is like battle formation, every stone conceals mystery.' If you can beat me, it proves you're qualified to learn this technique.

options.text: Alright! Please guide me, Miss Huang!

nodes.speaker: Huang Rong
nodes.text: Hehe, I won't hold back then!

nodes.speaker: Huang Rong
nodes.text: Excellent! Your Go game is very methodical. In that case, I'll teach you 'Mechanism Mastery.'

nodes.speaker: Huang Rong
nodes.text: The key to this technique is: during a game, you can establish multiple variation diagrams in your mind, exploring different moves to find the optimal solution. Limited to twice per game, or available again after a 10-move cooldown.

nodes.speaker: Huang Rong
nodes.text: Remember, when using this technique, be 'meticulous and flawless.' Father always says, 'Too clever by half,' but on the Go board, cleverness wins games!

nodes.speaker: Huang Rong
nodes.text: By the way, since you've learned Brother Jing's and Seventh Master's techniques, why not go to Dali to find Duan Yu? His 'Six Meridian Divine Sword' can also be applied to Go!

options.text: I'd like to hear more of your insights
I want to challenge you again

nodes.speaker: Huang Rong
nodes.text: Hehe, it's alright. Father says, 'Failure is the mother of success.' Practice more and come back later!

nodes.speaker: Huang Rong
nodes.text: In Go, the most important thing is 'strategizing to win decisively from afar.' Look at Father - proficient in music, Go, calligraphy, and painting - all because he's good at thinking.

nodes.speaker: Huang Rong
nodes.text: Also, when girls play Go, they should 'overcome hardness with softness.' Brother Jing always says I play Go with too many tricks, but he's just too honest, haha!

nodes.speaker: Huang Rong
nodes.text: No problem, come find me when you're ready. Brother Jing and I are often in Xiangyang, you're welcome to challenge us anytime!

nodes.speaker: Huang Rong
nodes.text: Hehe, come visit often! Guarding Xiangyang can be boring, it's nice to have a Go friend.
